# Jonathon Plumb — AI Solutions Engineer

> Portfolio of Jon Plumb: production generative-AI and agentic systems.
> Building with LLMs since the GPT-3 era. Detroit, MI.

## Projects
- Nitruz (https://nitruz.com): AI vehicle photography SaaS — live, pre-launch
- ResumeAye (https://resume-aye.onrender.com/): AI resume-tailoring SaaS — live
- The Lab: hardened multi-machine AI lab running Hermes, a self-hosted multi-agent platform (MCP, Claude, Ollama fallback)
